title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
